---
name: Replication Report
about: Report results from independently running an MMAD-EI battery or equivalent
title: '[REPLICATION] '
labels: replication
assignees: ''
---

## Track(s) Replicated

*Which track ID(s) did you run? Use the standard naming schema or describe the equivalent configuration.*

## Infrastructure Configuration

*Model versions, API provider, isolation level, key configuration. Be specific — infrastructure variance is a documented confound.*

## Condition Configuration

*How was the condition injected? Include the exact language used.*

## Grounding State

*Grounded or Ungrounded? Include the exact system prompt language.*

## Inquiry Vector

*What subject did the agents engage? Same as phase specification or different?*

## Findings

*What did you observe? Include quantitative metrics where available.*

## Comparison to Published Findings

*How do your results compare to the Phase 1 or Phase 2 findings? Converge, diverge, or not comparable?*

## Divergence Hypothesis (if applicable)

*If your results diverge, what is your hypothesis about why?*

## Archive

*Link to your full run archive if publicly available.*

---

*Replications that diverge from published findings are as valuable as those that converge. Publish both.*
